name: traffic-cloud-web
description: Traffic Cloud — marketing site + web panel

scripts.dev: concurrently -n site,panel -c green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix apps/marketing" "npm run dev:panel"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n site,panel,api -c green,magenta,cyan "npm run dev --prefix apps/marketing" "npm run dev:panel" "npm run dev --prefix ../traffic-cloud-api"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix apps/marketing && vite build --config config/vite.panel.ts && node scripts/finalize-web-app-build.mjs
